title: ThresholdElection
description: Specifies whether the threshold is rating based, a fixed amount, or infinity.

party.description: The party to which the threshold applies.

fixedAmount.description: Defines that the Threshold is a Fixed Amount.

ratingsBased.description: Defines that the Threshold is based on a Ratings condition(s).

infinity.description: Specifies that the Threshold is Infinity. If 'True' then the threshold for the elective party is Infinity.

other.description: Utilised where the clause data structure is not able to capture a material aspect of the clause.
